name: visual-exploration
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML visual-exploration board: a context/prompt header above a grid of labeled artboards, each presenting one design direction as a static mockup card with a rationale. The reference's live light/dark toggle is dropped (static directions).

slots.description: Exploration title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
Prompt or problem statement that motivated the exploration.
Design directions; each renders a labeled artboard with a static mockup and a rationale note.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
